topics.name: 100 - 200 Level: UNEC Legal System, Constitutional Law & Contracts
topics.description: Nigerian Legal System, Legal Methods, Constitutional Law I & II, and Law of Contract at UNEC Enugu.

subtopics.name: LAW 101: Nigerian Legal System and Legal Methods (UNEC)
objectives: Analyze sources of Nigerian law, judicial precedents, and law court structures at UNEC Enugu Campus

subtopics.name: LAW 201 & LAW 202: Constitutional Law and Law of Contract
objectives: Study 1999 Nigerian Constitution, human rights enforcement, contract formation, and breach remedies

topics.name: 300 - 500 Level: Criminal Law, Land Law, Evidence, Jurisprudence, and UNEC Thesis
topics.description: Criminal Law, Land Law, Law of Torts, Equity & Trusts, CAMA 2020, and LL.B. Thesis.

subtopics.name: LAW 301 & LAW 401: Criminal Law, Torts, Land Law, and Evidence
objectives: Analyze Criminal Code/Penal Code offenses, Land Use Act 1978, torts of negligence, and Evidence Act 2011

subtopics.name: LAW 501 & LAW 599: Equity, CAMA 2020, Jurisprudence, and LL.B. Project
objectives: Master corporate law, jurisprudence theories, and defend legal thesis before UNEC Faculty Board
